_comment: Manifest of Learning Atlas subjects. The hub home (index.html) renders its cards from this file, so adding a subject is a data change here — no HTML edits. status: 'live' links to href; 'soon' renders a disabled Coming-soon card. icon: an Atlas.icon name (core/shell.js); tint: the card icon's colour.

subjects.name: History
subjects.description: Eight conflicts from the French & Indian War to the Cold War — animated borders, battles, leaders and treaties on an interactive world map.

subjects.name: Biology
subjects.description: A knowledge map of interactive lessons from “what is life?” to biotechnology — explore cells, drive photosynthesis and osmosis simulations, build DNA, cross traits and balance ecosystems. Explore, discover and master; each concept unlocks the next. The original clickable diagrams and 3-D models live on as the exploration surface inside lessons.

subjects.name: Mathematics
subjects.description: A knowledge map of interactive lessons — counting, fractions, arrays, the coordinate plane and function machines. Explore, discover and master; each concept unlocks the next.

subjects.name: English
subjects.description: Language and literature — grammar, rhetoric, poetic form and the stories that shaped them.

subjects.name: Chemistry
subjects.description: An interactive periodic table, bonding, reactions and the states of matter.

subjects.name: Geography
subjects.description: Physical and human geography — climate, tectonics, biomes and the shape of nations.
